description: Style Noteshorts are the coolest bottoms to wear in the current season - and perhaps the most versatile too. Slip into this pair when on a long journey, a casual day at home or at the gym. Pair them with sports shoes or flip flops to suit the occasion.Product DetailsNavy blue shorts with an elasticated waist that have a drawstring inside, two side pockets, adidas three patented stripes on the sides in orange, mesh panels on the sides and hem, brand logo printed above the decorative hem on the left side and is engineered with Climalite technologyMaterial and Care100% PolyesterMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, dry clean, tumble dry or bleachFlat dry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
